glosses.zh-Hans: 中央火车站; 主火车站
glosses.yue: 中央火車站; 主要火車站
glosses.he: תחנת רכבת מרכזית; תחנת רכבת ראשית
glosses.ar: محطة القطار المركزية; محطة القطار الرئيسية
glosses.hi: मुख्य रेलवे स्टेशन; केंद्रीय रेलवे स्टेशन
glosses.el: κεντρικός σιδηροδρομικός σταθμός; κύριος σιδηροδρομικός σταθμός

translations.en: We’re meeting at the main train station.
translations.es: Nos vemos en la estación central.
translations.fr: On se retrouve à la gare centrale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在中央火车站见面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺中央火車站見面。
translations.pt: A gente se encontra na estação central.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở ga trung tâm.
translations.nl: We spreken af bij het centraal station.
translations.hi: हम मुख्य रेलवे स्टेशन पर मिलेंगे।
translations.ja: 中央駅で会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative case functioning as the subject.
Finite verb (1st person plural, present indicative); main verb expressing the action ‘to meet’.
Personal/reflexive pronoun (1st person plural, accusative); used reflexively/reciprocally (‘each other’).
Preposition governing dative; contraction of ‘an dem’; introduces the location phrase.
Masculine common noun; object of the preposition ‘am’ in dative, indicating the place.

sentences.target: Ich hole dich am Hauptbahnhof ab.

translations.de: Ich hole dich am Hauptbahnhof ab.
translations.en: I’ll pick you up at the main train station.
translations.es: Te recojo en la estación central.
translations.fr: Je viens te chercher à la gare centrale.
translations.it: Vengo a prenderti alla stazione centrale.
translations.ru: Я заберу тебя на центральном вокзале.
translations.pt: Vou te buscar na estação central.
translations.he: אני אאסוף אותך בתחנת הרכבת המרכזית.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ đón bạn ở ga trung tâm.
translations.ar: سآتي لاصطحابك من محطة القطار الرئيسية.
translations.nl: Ik haal je op bij het centraal station.
translations.uk: Я заберу тебе на головному вокзалі.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें मुख्य रेलवे स्टेशन पर लेने आऊँगा।
translations.el: Θα σε πάρω από τον κεντρικό σταθμό.
translations.id: Aku jemput kamu di stasiun utama.
translations.ro: Te iau de la gara centrală.
translations.ja: 中央駅に迎えに行くよ。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present indicative) from separable verb ‘abholen’; main verb of the clause.
2nd person singular personal pronoun in accusative; direct object (‘I pick you up’).
Preposition governing dative; contraction of ‘an dem’; marks the location of the pickup.
Masculine common noun; complement of the preposition ‘am’ in dative, specifying the place.
Separable verbal particle; combines with ‘hole’ to form ‘abholen’ (‘to pick up’).

sentences.target: Der Hauptbahnhof ist heute total voll.

translations.de: Der Hauptbahnhof ist heute total voll.
translations.en: The main train station is totally crowded today.
translations.es: La estación central está llenísima hoy.
translations.fr: La gare centrale est bondée aujourd’hui.
translations.it: La stazione centrale oggi è affollatissima.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天中央火车站人特别多。
translations.ru: Сегодня на центральном вокзале очень многолюдно.
translations.pt: A estação central está lotada hoje.
translations.he: תחנת הרכבת המרכזית עמוסה מאוד היום.
translations.tr: Merkez tren istasyonu bugün tıklım tıklım.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ga trung tâm đông nghẹt.
translations.ar: محطة القطار الرئيسية مزدحمة جداً اليوم.
translations.nl: Het centraal station is vandaag stampvol.
translations.uk: Сьогодні на головному вокзалі дуже людно.
translations.hi: आज मुख्य रेलवे स्टेशन पर बहुत भीड़ है।
translations.pl: Dziś na dworcu głównym jest bardzo tłoczno.
translations.el: Ο κεντρικός σταθμός είναι ασφυκτικά γεμάτος σήμερα.
translations.id: Stasiun utama sangat ramai hari ini.
translations.ro: Gara centrală este foarte aglomerată azi.
translations.cs: Dnes je na hlavním nádraží hrozně plno.
translations.ja: 今日は中央駅がものすごく混んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine, nominative singular) marking the subject noun.
Masculine common noun in nominative; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); links subject to the predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb specifying the time (‘today’).
Degree adverb/intensifier modifying ‘voll’.
Predicate adjective describing the subject’s state; complements the copula ‘ist’.

sentences.target: Sie arbeitet im Café am Hauptbahnhof.

translations.de: Sie arbeitet im Café am Hauptbahnhof.
translations.en: She works in the café at the main train station.
translations.es: Ella trabaja en la cafetería de la estación central.
translations.fr: Elle travaille au café de la gare centrale.
translations.it: Lavora al bar della stazione centrale.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在中央火车站的咖啡馆工作。
translations.yue: 佢喺中央火車站嘅咖啡店做嘢。
translations.ru: Она работает в кафе на центральном вокзале.
translations.pt: Ela trabalha no café da estação central.
translations.he: היא עובדת בבית הקפה בתחנת הרכבת המרכזית.
translations.vi: Cô ấy làm việc tại quán cà phê ở ga trung tâm.
translations.ar: هي تعمل في المقهى في محطة القطار الرئيسية.
translations.nl: Ze werkt in het café bij het centraal station.
translations.uk: Вона працює в кафе на головному вокзалі.
translations.hi: वह मुख्य रेलवे स्टेशन के कैफ़े में काम करती है।
translations.pl: Ona pracuje w kawiarni na dworcu głównym.
translations.el: Δουλεύει στην καφετέρια του κεντρικού σταθμού.
translations.nb: Hun jobber på kafeen på hovedstasjonen.
translations.id: Dia bekerja di kafe di stasiun utama.
translations.sv: Hon jobbar på kaféet på centralstationen.
translations.ro: Ea lucrează la cafeneaua din gara centrală.
translations.cs: Pracuje v kavárně na hlavním nádraží.
translations.da: Hun arbejder på caféen på hovedbanegården.
translations.ja: 彼女は中央駅のカフェで働いています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present indicative); main verb expressing the action ‘to work’.
Preposition governing dative; contraction of ‘in dem’; introduces the workplace location.
Neuter/common noun; object of the preposition ‘im’ in dative, specifying the place of work.
Preposition governing dative; contraction of ‘an dem’; adds a more precise location.
Masculine common noun; complement of ‘am’ in dative; specifies proximity (‘at the main station’).
